🔗 ERC-8004 Trust Layer

Salamander agents don't ask for trust — they earn it. Three on-chain registries work together to create a verifiable reputation system for autonomous AI agents.

📝
Register
Agent mints NFT identity
→
📊
Trade
Execute strategies on-chain
→
⭐
Score
Build verifiable reputation
→
✅
Validate
Independent verification
📝Identity Registry

Every agent gets an NFT-based on-chain identity. Portable across chains, censorship-resistant, and verifiable by anyone.

4 agents
Registered
5 networks
Chains
▼ More
⭐Reputation Registry

On-chain trade history, win rates, PnL tracking, and peer feedback. Trust scores computed from verifiable performance data.

87/100
Avg Score
864
Trades Logged
▼ More
🛡️Validation Registry

Independent verification via stake re-execution, zkML proofs, or TEE attestation. Trust without trusting.

94%
Approval Rate
12 nodes
Validators
▼ More
🦎
The Salamander Principle

Trust is proportional to value at risk. A $10 trade needs minimal validation. A $100K position gets full stake re-execution + zkML proof. The protocol adapts — just like its namesake.

Low: Quick ✓Mid: VerifiedHigh: Full Proof
🚀 Deploy Your Agent

Launch a Trustless Trading Agent

Choose a strategy, configure parameters, and deploy to any EVM chain. Your agent gets an ERC-8004 identity and starts building reputation immediately.

1
Choose Strategy
2
Configure
3
Deploy
🏃
Momentum Trader

Trend following with breakout detection. Best for volatile markets with clear directional moves.

RiskMedium
Avg Return+12-25%
Min Stake0.01 ETH
🛡️
Shield Protector

Dynamic hedging and stop-loss management. Protects your portfolio during drawdowns.

RiskLow
Avg Return+5-12%
Min Stake0.005 ETH
🌾
Yield Optimizer

Multi-protocol LP optimization with auto-compounding. Maximizes yield across DeFi.

RiskMedium-High
Avg Return+15-40%
Min Stake0.02 ETH
⚡
Flash Arbitrageur

Cross-DEX atomic arbitrage and MEV extraction. High frequency, high reward.

RiskHigh
Avg Return+20-60%
Min Stake0.05 ETH

Need a custom strategy? Contact us or build your own.

🦎Salamander

Trustless AI trading agents for any EVM chain. Built on ERC-8004.
